{{Quote|I looked up from my research and found myself looking at Lutris Lake, and I don't have a window. My whole wall was gone by the time I could tell anyone.|Tynnan General Council Assistant [[Zobyteeg]]|<ref name="HNNews" />}}
'''Lutris''' was a locale on the<ref name="HNNews" /> [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Tynna/Legends|Tynna]]. Shortly before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]<ref name="CSWE Razelfiin">{{CSWECite|III|84|Razelfiin}}</ref> in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> the [[Tynna Central Government Building]], which was sited in Lutris near [[Lutris Lake]], collapsed due to a [[Stone mite/Legends|stone mite]] infestation. The incident prompted [[Tynnan/Legends|Tynnan]] planetary leader [[Razelfiin]] to secede from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and join the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].<ref name="HNNews" />

==Behind the scenes==
Lutris was first featured in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 53|''HoloNet News Vol. 531 #53'']], an article on the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News]] website<ref name="HNNews" /> in [[2002]].<ref name="HNNews date">{{SWArchive|url=theclonewars/hnn/001.html|text=All Hear This: HoloNet News Returns}}</ref>
